title: FINAL SECURITY AUDIT REPORT
summary: This Final Security Report aggregates all Red Team exploits and Blue Team defense controls performed by Lakshay. It provides an overview of target security posture and mitigations.

recommendations.title: Maintain Multi-layered Defense-in-Depth
recommendations.description: Ensure application filters are configured at the routing layer, controller validation layer, database query layer, and response header layer.
